title: Principal Software Engineer · Platform & Developer Experience
location: Berlin, Germany · Open to remote across EU/UK
summary: Principal engineer with 14+ years delivering large-scale distributed systems, internal developer platforms, and observability programs across fintech and logistics. Known for reducing incident rates, mentoring staff engineers, and aligning architecture decisions with measurable business outcomes. Comfortable leading cross-region teams, writing RFCs consumed by 200+ engineers, and partnering with security/compliance on SOC2-ready delivery. Seeking roles where platform reliability, developer velocity, and inclusive engineering culture are first-class priorities. Additional line to test summary wrap and page flow without clipping.
skills:
Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, SQL, Bash
Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue, design systems, accessibility (WCAG 2.2), performance budgets
Backend: Node.js, gRPC, GraphQL, REST, event-driven architecture, CQRS, saga patterns
Data: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, DynamoDB, ClickHouse, data modeling, query tuning
Cloud: AWS (EKS, Lambda, RDS, S3, CloudFront), GCP, Terraform, Pulumi, Kubernetes, Helm
DevOps: CI/CD, GitHub Actions, GitLab, Jenkins, Argo CD, Docker, observability, OpenTelemetry
Security: OAuth2/OIDC, mTLS, secrets management, threat modeling, dependency scanning
Leadership: mentoring, hiring loops, RFC review, stakeholder management, roadmap planning
Practices: Agile, Scrum, Kanban, DORA metrics, SRE, incident command, postmortems, SLA/SLO/SLI

experience.company: Northwind Global Enterprise Systems GmbH — Platform Engineering Division
bullets: Owned internal developer platform serving 220+ engineers across 40 product squads; cut median build times by 38% and deployment frequency up 2.1×.
Led migration from monolithic release train to trunk-based delivery with automated canary analysis and rollback playbooks adopted org-wide.
Designed multi-tenant observability stack (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana) reducing MTTR from 94m to 41m over 12 months.
Partnered with security on zero-trust service mesh rollout; zero critical findings in external penetration test after remediation sprint.
Built real-time shipment tracking API handling 12k RPS peak with PostgreSQL read replicas and Redis caching layer.
Introduced contract testing (Pact) between 18 services; reduced integration regressions in QA by 55%.
Mentored 6 engineers through promotion cycles; established guild for backend best practices and on-call hygiene.
Implemented PCI-scoped payment reconciliation pipeline processing 2M+ transactions daily with idempotent workers.
Migrated reporting warehouse from batch ETL to streaming aggregates (Kafka + Flink prototype).
On-call rotation lead for tier-1 payment APIs; authored runbooks still referenced by operations.
Delivered customer portal in React/Node serving 500k MAU with A/B experimentation framework.
Optimized Core Web Vitals: LCP 4.2s → 2.1s via image CDN, code splitting, and server-side caching.
Maintained legacy .NET MVC modules while incrementally extracting bounded contexts into microservices.
Automated regression suite expansion; increased coverage from 42% to 71% in 10 months.
Prototyped IoT inventory sensors and dashboard; presented findings to leadership for pilot funding.
Short-term contract: routing optimization script reducing fuel estimates 7% on regional fleet pilot.
Supported statistical analysis pipelines in R and Python for HCI studies; co-authored workshop paper.
